creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Currently, for both ports: 
dot com <https://www.mozilla.com/firefox>. 

<https://www.mozilla.com/> alone redirects to 
dot org <https://www.mozilla.org/en-GB/firefox/>, localised. 

<https://www.mozilla.org/firefox/browsers/> categorises for us: 

1. desktop

2. mobile

3. enterprise (including ESR). 

Respectively, non-localised: 

1. <https://www.mozilla.org/firefox/new/>

2. <https://www.mozilla.org/firefox/browsers/mobile/>

3. <https://www.mozilla.org/firefox/enterprise/>

Please consider using: 

    (1) as the WWW for www/firefox

    (3) as the WWW for www/firefox-esr

– thank you.
